name: Kinzou Shima
description: Kinzou is the fourth son of the Shima family, Renzou's older brother. He seems to be a pretty simple guy who is ruled by his emotions, kicking his little brother in the head as a greeting and paying no attention to the conversation at breakfast, preferring to stuff his face.

name: Kogasa Tatara
description: Kogasa Tatara is a karakasa who wants to surprise people. She hasn't been very successful so far. She tried to scare the heroine just for fun, but she was beaten easily. Later on, she decided to go to Byakuren's Temple to try and scare her, but instead, she met the same person and got beaten again. At Ten Desires she tries to enter the cemetery, but is stopped by Yoshika (guarding the cemetery of the intrusion), then asks the heroine who has beaten the keeper of the cemetery. name: Kula Diamond
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'6½) Kula Diamond (クーラ・ダイアモンド) first appears as the sub-boss in The King of Fighters 2000; she enters as a normal participant in her other appearances. Her original hair color is chestnut brown, but it changes to a light blue when she activates her ice powers. She was designed to be the antagonistic foil to K', in an attempt to better develop characteristics of the NESTS cartel. name: Kuzuha Doumoto
description: A classmate of Akatsuki's and Miu's, also the Class Rep of their class. She is a really small girl, who is also really young, about the age of an elementary schooler. However, because of her being really smart and clever, she gets to be in high school. Doumoto has usually an emotionless expression most of time, and rarely smiles. Her element is earth, and her weapon is a gigantic, wooden hammer.

name: Luca
description: Luca, along with her twin brother Lua, aid Yusei Fudo, whom they adore and support in his duels while making fun of fate. Luca is calm and collected. name: Mitsuba Okita
description: __Height:__ 168 cm Mitsuba is Sougo's older sister, and took care of him since their parents passed away when they were children. Sougo cares deeply for Mitsuba, and is uncharacteristically polite and docile when around her. She is acquainted with the rest of the Shinsengumi, and regularly brings them extra-spicy senbei, which she herself enjoys. She suffers from tuberculosis, and often requires medical treatment, which Sougo used to send money for. She has romantic feelings for Hijikata. Althou

description: She is a member of the Raiders front line.

name: Nagisa Hino
description: She is a cool, delinquent kid who is often skipping class. Despite continuously toying with Koguma, Hino seems to have a slight crush on her.

name: Nana Habutae
description: A veteran N-City Magical Girl and Weiss Winterprison's lover. In real life, she is a sweet girl who lives with Shizuku. She has dedicated her career to protecting the city and bringing a message of peace. She wears a nun-like dress as her Magical Girl outfit. Her ability allows her to enhance a person's physical capabilities. ~!Following Winterprison's death, she commits suicide by hanging, becoming the ninth magical girl to die.!~

name: Nomamoto
description: A 17-year-old girl who works at a factory run by an alien, who she hates. In fact, she hates all of the aliens that are now living in Japan.
